text:
is a company created in March 2010 in order to manage Khara inc. copyright licenses and other works. The current CEO is Yasuhiro Kamimura, who's managed the franchise's licensing since 2001. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/convention/2020/anime-limited-cloud-matsuri-online/licensing-evangelion-yasuhiro-kamimiura/.160227 It is responsible for Planning, Development, Sales and copyright management of characters and character products. Planning, production and advertising agency business of sales promotion activities of companies
